allow: PowerShell(Test-Path ".env.local"; Get-Content ".env.local" | Where-Object { $_ -match "^FIREBASE_ADMIN" } | ForEach-Object { if \($_ -match "PRIVATE_KEY"\) { $line = $_.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(50, $_.Length\)\) + "..." + " [len=" + $_.Length + "]"; $line } else { $_ } })

PowerShell(Get-Content ".env.local" | Where-Object { $_ -match "FIREBASE" -or $_ -match "ADMIN" -or $_ -match "PRIVATE" } | ForEach-Object { if \($_ -match "PRIVATE_KEY|API_KEY"\) { $eqIdx = $_.IndexOf\("="\); if \($eqIdx -gt 0\) { $_.Substring\(0, $eqIdx\) + "=<redacted len=" + \($_.Length - $eqIdx - 1\) + ">" } else { $_ } } else { $_ } })

Bash(GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS="C:/Users/pc/AppData/Local/Temp/firebase-sa.json" FIREBASE_CLI_PREVIEWS= FIREBASE_DEPLOY_AGENT=ci npx --yes firebase-tools@latest deploy --only firestore:rules --project studio-6301887284-1e730 --force --non-interactive)
